subprograms.name: Append

documentation.description:
Append a string to a list value.  The list value is created if it
doesn't already exist.

subprograms.name: Clear
subprograms.code: procedure Clear (Params : in out Parameter_Set_Type)

documentation.description: Clear any parameters defined in the parameter set.

subprograms.name: Dump

documentation.description:
Write the set of parameters defined in a parameter set to a file.  This
is a debugging routine.

subprograms.name: Get
subprograms.code:
function Get
  (Params : Parameter_Set_Type;
   Name   : String)
   return Value_Type'Class

documentation.description:
General parameter query routine.  This can be used to handle user
defined parameter types.

subprograms.name: Get_Boolean
subprograms.code:
function Get_Boolean
  (Params : Parameter_Set_Type;
   Name   : String)
   return Boolean

documentation.description:
Get the value of boolean parameter.  Both Not_A_Boolean_Error and
Not_Defined_Error can be raised.

subprograms.name: Get_Float
subprograms.code:
function Get_Float
  (Params : Parameter_Set_Type;
   Name   : String)
   return Float

documentation.description:
Get the value of floating point parameter.  Both Not_A_Real_Error and
Not_Defined_Error can be raised.

subprograms.name: Get_Integer
subprograms.code:
function Get_Integer
  (Params : Parameter_Set_Type;
   Name   : String)
   return Integer

documentation.description:
Return the value of an integer parameter.  Both Not_An_Integer and
Not_Defined_Error can be raised.

subprograms.name: Get_List
subprograms.code:
function Get_List
  (Params : Parameter_Set_Type;
   Name   : String)
   return List_Type

documentation.description:
Return the value of a list parameter.  An Not_Defined_Error can be
raised.

subprograms.name: Get_Name
subprograms.code:
function Get_Name
  (Params : Parameter_Set_Type)
   return String

documentation.description:
Return the name associated with the parameter set.  This the empty
string, by default, but can be set using the Set_Name routine.

subprograms.name: Get_String
subprograms.code:
function Get_String
  (Params : Parameter_Set_Type;
   Name   : String)
   return String

documentation.description:
Return the value of a string parameter.  Not_Defined_Error can be
raised.

subprograms.name: Get_Time
subprograms.code:
function Get_Time
  (Params : Parameter_Set_Type;
   Name   : String)
   return Time

documentation.description:
Return the value of a time parameter.  Not_Defined_Error can be
raised.

subprograms.name: Increment

documentation.description:
Increment the value of an integer parameter.  Both Not_An_Integer and
Not_Defined_Error can be raised.

subprograms.name: Is_Defined
subprograms.code:
function Is_Defined
  (Params : Parameter_Set_Type;
   Name   : String)
   return Boolean

documentation.description: Determine if a parameter is defined in the parameter set.

subprograms.name: Number_Of_Parameters
subprograms.code:
function Number_Of_Parameters
  (Params : Parameter_Set_Type)
   return Natural

documentation.description: Return the number of parameters defined in a parameter set.

subprograms.name: Prepend

documentation.description:
Prepend a string to a list value.  The list value is created if it
doesn't already exist.

subprograms.name: Set

documentation.description:
General parameter set routine.  This can be used to support user
defined parameter types.

subprograms.name: Set_Boolean

documentation.description: Set a boolean parameter value.

subprograms.name: Set_Float

documentation.description: Set a floating point parameter value.

subprograms.name: Set_Integer

documentation.description: Set an integer parameter value.

subprograms.name: Set_Name

documentation.description: Set the name associated with a parameter set.

subprograms.name: Set_String

documentation.description: Set a string parameter value.

subprograms.name: Set_Time

documentation.description: Set a time parameter value.

subprograms.name: Type_Name
subprograms.code:
function Type_Name
  (Params : Parameter_Set_Type;
   Name   : String)
   return String

documentation.description:
Return the type name a parameter.  Not_Defined_Error can be
raised.
